description: Retrieve the LLM response text from specific turns in a sub-session. Use this to get the final reply of a call_llm or batch_llm sub-task after it has completed. Returns the assistant's full text response for the requested turn(s). Supports up to 20 turn_ids at once. If a turn or session doesn't exist, returns an error for that entry. Tip: sub_session_id and turn_id are returned by call_llm (sync/async) and written to batch_llm's pipeline JSON file.
name: get_llm_result

session_id.description: Required. The sub-session ID returned by call_llm (or written to pipeline JSON by batch_llm)

turn_ids.description: Required (or turn_id). Array of turn IDs to retrieve results for. Max 20 items.

turn_id.description: Deprecated, use turn_ids instead. Single turn ID for backward compatibility.
